offer: For medical clinics processing 10–20 invoices/month, inefficient record handling causes cash flow gaps. We automate form conversion instead of manual data entry into insurance forms.
problem: Timely conversion of patient records into insurance submission forms.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for medical clinics
Indie Hackers posts about similar workflows
DM outreach to clinics with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools and resources
try_it: Let users try manual data entry support for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
CSV import for existing patient records
